phrases.phrase: Configure automatic Steam VAC/Game ban checking for enlistment applications.
Your Steam Web API key. Obtain one from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey
The XenForo user ID of the account that will post VAC check results in each enlistment thread. Set to 0 to disable posting.
The forum node ID where enlistment applications are posted. New threads created in this node will trigger a Steam VAC check. Default: 325.
Logs each step of the VAC check to the server error log. Turn off in production once everything is confirmed working.

User group IDs whose members may invoke the bot by posting !vac <steam_url_or_id> in an enlistment thread. Enter one ID per line or separate with commas (e.g. 4, 7). Leave blank to disable the command entirely. Find group IDs under Admin > Users > User Groups.
